title: Photo Restoration for A4 Prints
brief: I need several old photo scans restored for A4 printing to mount on my wall. Restoration is needed due to: - Color fading - Scratches or tears - Blurriness The main focus should be on improving overall clarity. Ideal skills and experience: - Proficiency in photo editing software like Photoshop - Experience with photo restoration techniques - Attention to detail - Ability to work with a variety of damage types
